title: Analysis services module (input/project resolution and parsing utilities)
body:
Introduced **`beskid_analysis` services**: input resolution, project discovery, parsing helpers, and shared analysis utilities used by CLI and (later) LSP entry points.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`0fe2488`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/0fe2488)
- **Subject:** Add beskid_analysis services module with input/project resolution, parsing, and analysis utilities
- **Completed:** 2026-02-27

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
Centralized “how do we find and parse a project?” logic instead of duplicating it across binaries—direct ancestor of today’s shared analyze pipeline inputs. Foreshadowed `prepared_workspace` / assembly resolution in later bands.

source.subject: Add beskid_analysis services module with input/project resolution, parsing, and analysis utilities
